title: HCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited has released the official Store Keeper Notification 2026 on 20-05-2026 at cochinshipyard.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a qualification of Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management or Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical) can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 09-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation: PwBD: up to 45 years; Ex-servicemen: as per GoI guidelines (max 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management, Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical)
qualification.details: Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management Or Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical)

selection_process: Objective Type Offline Test Descriptive Type Offline Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
